speaker: speaker1
text: What seems to be the trouble , Mr . Brown ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm in pretty bad shape , Dr . Ford .

speaker: speaker2
text: No appetite , always on edge , and I can't sleep well .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I have lost quite a few pounds since last month .

speaker: speaker1
text: When was the last time you had a check-up ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Let me take your blood pressure . You look anemic .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , Mr . Brown , I'm happy to say it's nothing serious .

speaker: speaker1
text: You're just a little run-down from overwork .

speaker: speaker2
text: What am I supposed to do ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I think all you need is just a vacation .

speaker: speaker2
text: Try to get outdoors more and be sure to get more rest .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you , doctor . I'll do as you say .
